This plant is part of the genus Tinus, which is a group of evergreen shrubs and small trees. Tinus insularis is a succulent species with a unique appearance, characterized by its greenish-gray leaves and small white flowers. The specific classification and taxonomy of Tinus insularis may be subject to ongoing research and updates in botanical science.
